description: Discussion on the Exchange Booth project, focusing on its design and implementation. The project aims to simulate a currency exchange using two token types, with prices determined by an oracle. Participants will design the smart contract without a formal autograder, allowing for a hands-on experience in building decentralized applications.
topic_summary: Overview of the Exchange Booth project, its objectives, and design considerations. The project emphasizes the use of oracles for price determination and encourages participants to explore creative implementations.
